examples: Fearlessness stems from selflessness.; Only the selfless can be fearless.
Thanks for your hard work and selflessness.
In Chinese culture, "laohuangniu" is a symbol of hard work and selflessness, because it works hard but asks nothing for itself.
Economists, typically baffled by selflessness, have tended to hunt for hidden self-interest in apparent altruism.
In fact, it can be very difficult to spot when the ego masquerades as selflessness.
